sanskrit:
अव्यक्ताद्व्यक्तयः सर्वाः प्रभवन्त्यहरागमे।
रात्र्यागमे प्रलीयन्ते तत्रैवाव्यक्तसंज्ञके॥
transliteration:
avyaktād vyaktayaḥ sarvāḥ prabhavanty ahar-āgame |
rātry-āgame pralīyante tatraivāvyakta-saṃjñake ||
literal_meaning: From the unmanifest all manifestations arise at the coming of day; at the coming of night they dissolve back into that same unmanifest field.
contextual_meaning: Conscious experiences (thoughts, moods, identities) cyclically emerge from and subside into an unconscious ground; recognizing this dissolves over-identification with any single state.
psychological_state: Meta-cognitive awareness that observes the birth and death of mental states without fusing with them.
trigger_scenario: You notice your anxious morning thoughts vanish by afternoon and realize every mood, like a dream, has automatic expiry; the watcher remains.
anchor_text: Watch every mood rise and fall from the silent ground beneath.
